CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="diskret" href="bildegalleri.asp?BildeID=16"><img alt="" border="0" src="02_sendbinary.asp?path=E:webhotell\localuser\finnmarkshallen.no/MineFiler/Bilder/20190225 HC rotert (2).jpg&Width=
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="diskret2" href="http://www.datamann.no" target="_blank">Datamann AS, 9550 Øksfjord</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="sok" name="sok" size="17" type="text"/>
Add a
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has onmouseover without keyboard equivalent

<a href="javascript:history.go(-1)" onmouseover="self.status=document.referrer;return true"><img alt="Tilbake" border="0" src="images/tilbakepil.jpg"/></a>
Add keyboard event handlers (onfocus, onblur, onkeydown) for equivalent functionality
3.1.1 Språk på siden (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.1.1 (3.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Page is missing language declaration

<html><!-- InstanceBegin template="Templates/mal1.dwt" codeOutsideHTMLIsLocked="false" --><head> <li
Add lang attribute to element (e.g., lang='nb' for Norwegian Bokmål)
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: Hopp til hovedinnhold

Element has onmouseover without keyboard equivalent
